tools.description: Bluetooth Low Energy swiss-army knife to sniff, jam, and hijack BLE connections using BBC micro:bit or nRF51 dongles.
Cracks and decrypts BLE encryption by brute-forcing the Just Works Temporary Key and recovering the STK/LTK.
BLE scanner and GATT enumerator for auditing BLE peripherals, with a focus on simple, scriptable recon.
Bluetooth Low Energy man-in-the-middle proxy with a web UI for intercepting and injecting BLE traffic.
Open-source 2.4 GHz wireless development platform (Ubertooth One) for sniffing Bluetooth Classic and BLE.
Python intelligence-gathering tool for Bluetooth Classic and BLE, supporting scanning, SDP, GATT discovery, and BD_ADDR spoofing.
Swiss-army knife for 802.11, BLE, IPv4 and IPv6 reconnaissance and MITM attacks, with a ble.recon module.
Official Linux Bluetooth protocol stack (BlueZ), including gatttool for GATT interaction with BLE peripherals.
Scapy-based BLE protocol fuzzer for Link Layer, L2CAP, ATT, and GATT layers, used to find multiple BLE CVEs.
Python tools for sniffing BLE HCI packets using an nRF24L01 or similar 2.4 GHz dongle and producing pcap output.
Python interface to the Linux BlueZ stack, providing easy BLE scanning and GATT client access.
Node.js BLE central library for cross-platform BLE scanning, GATT reads/writes, and notifications.
Node.js BLE peripheral library used to emulate GATT services, useful for building offensive test environments.
Simple Python API over BlueZ for Bluetooth Classic and BLE, including micro:bit-friendly helpers.
C++ BLE firmware and host tooling for Crownstone smart-plug hardware, including mesh and micro-app runtime.
MQTT bridge for BLE, IR, LoRa and other protocols, useful for reading/writing BLE devices from MQTT.
Cross-platform TUI Bluetooth manager written in Go for interacting with BLE and Classic adapters from the terminal.
Cross-platform TUI Bluetooth manager for Linux, macOS, and Windows, exposing pairing, OBEX, and media controls.
Python bindings for Nordic's nRF5x BLE HCI driver, enabling scripted control of nRF52 dev boards.
Collection of BLE pentest scripts built on Bleak for scanning, service enumeration, and characteristic reading.
Cross-platform, human-friendly BLE scanner TUI for inspecting nearby peripherals and GATT services.
Sniffs and decodes BLE GATT traffic, fingerprints device profiles, and asserts on insecure pairing in CI.
BLE privacy scanner for the M5Stack Cardputer that detects nearby devices, drone Remote ID, and PwnBeacons.
Android-first offensive Bluetooth framework covering BLUFFS, BrakTooth, Btlejuice MitM, and GATT fuzzing modules.
